fault_hypothesis: On line 67, when new_value exceeds the ceiling, it is set to `effective_ceiling - 1` instead of `effective_ceiling`, causing the counter to be clamped one below the ceiling rather than at the ceiling itself.

constraints.intent: After clamping, new_value should equal the ceiling, not ceiling minus 1.
The clamped value must equal the ceiling, not be one less than it.
After the clamping branch, new_value should be exactly the ceiling value.
